title: tragacantha tenax
intro: Tragacantha tenax, also known as Russian thistle or Silybum marianum, is a thistle-like plant with a woody stem and prickly leaves. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the production of bile and improve liver function. It is also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help protect against cell damage and improve overall health. Tragacantha tenax can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used to support liver health and promote digestion.
